The liposomal delivery of Salicylic Acid enhances penetration into the pores, allowing it to gently exfoliate, remove dead skin cell buildup, and help unclog pores. This reduces the chances of breakouts while promoting clearer, healthier-looking skin without causing excessive dryness. These ingredients provide antioxidant protection, help calm the skin, and support a refreshed, balanced complexion. With its lightweight, fast-absorbing texture, this serum helps control oil, minimize the appearance of pores, improve skin clarity, and support smoother-looking skin — making it ideal for oily and acne-prone skin types.

Powered by 5% Niacinamide, the formula helps regulate excess oil, refine the appearance of pores, strengthen the skin barrier, and improve overall skin clarity. Niacinamide also reduces dullness and supports a smoother, healthier-looking complexion. The serum is further enhanced with 2% Liposomal Alpha Arbutin, an advanced brightening active designed to target dark spots, acne marks, and uneven skin tone. The liposomal delivery system protects the actives from oxidation, releases them gradually through the day, and helps carry them deeper into the skin — so Niacinamide and Alpha Arbutin work where dark spots actually form, with less sting and irritation than conventional formulas. To maintain skin comfort and hydration, the formula includes Sodium PCA and Trehalose. These humectants attract and retain moisture, supporting the skin's natural hydration balance and preventing dryness while the brightening actives work on discoloration.
